other_observers: Emily MacDonald, Ryan Votta, Micah Helton, Daniel Helton
description:
First seen by Ryan Votta, Micah Helton, and Daniel Helton late afternoon on 04/11/2022 at Pastorius.  I received a text from Ryan saying that the bird was present.Single bird about the size of Ring-billed Gull.  Stout red bill with darker tip.  Dark colored legs.  Crown had black cap that extended down to below the eye so the eye of the bird blends in with the black crown cap.  Dark cap color did not extend down the back of lower portion of the head or neck.  Dark forehead.  White face (below eye), neck, breast, belly, and tail.  Light grey back and sides/wings.  Black undersides of primaries could be seen projecting to roughly the end of the tail when the bird was standing with wings folded.  In flight the black undersides of the wing tips were clearly visible.  In flight wings are thin and angular.
Photos of bird are included.
